generated_oml:
instance CraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes for container movement"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, PowerSupplyUnit
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for horizontal cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for vertical hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic lifting device for container handling"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit providing regulated power to all crane components"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed in the crane environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for acquiring sensor data from Swing Angle Encoder, Anemometer, and motor controllers"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStatesDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorStatesDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance CraneStatesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical data of crane operational states including swing angle, wind speed, and motor positions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, AnemometerDataTransmitted, MotorStatesDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance TrajectoryTracesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trajectory traces generated by the kinematic model for optimal movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance ValidationMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Validation metrics comparing real-time measurements with simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane structure created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization to minimize residual swinging"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for executing and validating crane trajectory dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time and historical data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for controlling and simulating the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for creating and managing crane structure models"
    DTDFVocab:enables Fusion360CADModel
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for system architecture modeling using Arcadia methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware design tool for creating schematics of electronic components"
    DTDFVocab:enables CartMotorController, HoistMotorController
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories for crane movement with minimal residual swinging"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for trajectory execution validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulation results for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, OperatorNotification
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical crane data to TimescaleDB for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of crane operations via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectory for minimal residual swinging during movement"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of simulation results against expected crane dynamics"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from historical crane operational data"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane trajectory traces for operational monitoring"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults based on time series classification results"
]

instance OperatorNotification : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notification to operators when validation thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent to the Control Application, which interfaces with the Physical Crane Interface to control motors and electromagnet movements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via C4 Model architecture with physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging, HMI) and digital components (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) interacting through MQTT communication and TimescaleDB data storage."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360, kinematic model) and as-operated stages (real-time data logging and validation during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulation outputs, comparing against predefined thresholds to ensure model fidelity; validation techniques reused from prior research on model validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for real-time signaling between services; SQL-based queries for TimescaleDB data access."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; Python modules for other components, with docker compose for automated setup."
]
